strategy.description: Controlled LightGBM direction-only benchmark using normalized EMA and Ehlers trend features. Target and temporal validation remain identical to trial 0041. Trading performance is intentionally disabled and is not part of the experiment objective.
strategy.name: ethusd_30m_trial0041_direction_trend_only_lgbm_v1

runtime.pythonhashseed_note: PYTHONHASHSEED set at runtime affects child processes, not hash seeding of current process.
